metadata.research_alignment: Chinese astrology and 12-year zodiac cycles; Lunar calendar systems and astronomical basis; Yin-Yang philosophy and Five Elements theory (Metal, Water, Wood, Fire, Earth); Traditional Chinese mythology and animal symbolism; Feng shui and spatial orientation associations; Traditional Chinese Medicine organ system associations; Cultural beliefs about auspicious dates and Dragon year fertility trends; Statistical analysis of birth rate clustering in Dragon years; Psychological mechanisms underlying zodiac belief (Barnum effect, confirmation bias, apophenia); Cognitive biases in zodiac compatibility assessment; Demographic patterns and birth cohort clustering; Economic effects of zodiac belief (housing prices, healthcare costs, education enrollment); Public health outcomes of zodiac-driven reproductive decisions; Mathematical properties of the 60-year sexagenary cycle; Comparison with Western astrology systems; Celebrity zodiac affiliations; Modern zodiac personality typing systems

coverage_details.kids_4_under: Simple animal identification for each zodiac sign with relatable characteristics, basic personality traits associated with zodiac animals (brave dragons, gentle rabbits), recognition of Chinese New Year traditions and symbols (lanterns, red envelopes), understanding that birth year determines zodiac sign, introduction to lunar calendar concept, lucky/auspicious associations with different animals
coverage_details.kids_10_under: Historical origins of Chinese zodiac system, 12-animal cycle and 12-year repetition pattern, mythological race story explaining zodiac order, elemental associations (fire, water, wood, metal, earth), zodiac compatibility concepts, personality stereotypes for each sign, feng shui cardinal direction associations, connection between zodiac and birth advantages/challenges in modern society
coverage_details.teenagers: Ancient Zhou dynasty origins of zodiac system (~500 BCE), Jupiter's 11.86-year orbital cycle alignment with zodiac, 60-year sexagenary cycle combining animals and elements, Yin-Yang pairing concepts (Tiger-Dragon opposition), traditional Chinese Medicine organ system associations, compatibility patterns (Trine Triangle groups, Opposition conflicts), feng shui applications and cardinal directions, statistical birth rate increases in Dragon years, educational overcrowding consequences, celebrity zodiac affiliations, comparison with Western zodiac systems
coverage_details.no_humanity: Birth rate clustering statistics in Dragon years (5-10% increase), demographic analysis of zodiac-driven fertility preferences, housing market inflation in zodiac-conscious regions (15-30% price premiums), educational enrollment bottlenecks and resource allocation optimization, hospital capacity constraints during Dragon-year peak deliveries, C-section rate elevation due to auspicious date selection, cognitive biases explaining zodiac belief (Barnum effect, confirmation bias, pareidolia), mathematical properties of 60-year cycle (LCM of 12 and 5), logistic regression analysis showing no zodiac-career correlation, Shannon entropy of birth distribution patterns, Hawthorne effect and self-fulfilling prophecies, machine learning feature importance scores, null hypothesis testing in epidemiological studies, behavioral economics of auspicious date pricing
